title: Chewy Moroccan Kabanos Sausages Stir-fry
description: A fresh and chewy Moroccan-inspired dish featuring kabanos sausages in a flavorful stir-fry sauce, suitable for weeknight meals with Jain-friendly ingredients.
instructions: Heat olive oil in a wok or large frying pan over medium heat.
Add kabanos sausages to the pan and cook until golden brown, about 3-4 minutes per side. Remove from pan and set aside.
In the same pan, add onions and garlic, cooking until translucent, about 5 minutes.
Fold in tomatoes and red bell pepper, cooking for an additional 5 minutes.
Stir in cumin seeds, coriander seeds, turmeric powder, and salt. Simmer for another 2-3 minutes to meld the flavors.
Return sausages to pan with sauce and stir gently until evenly coated.
Serve hot over steamed rice or quinoa.
